codeReview.summary: Prior failed diffs (33f9ac2, 991904f, ae68a63) introduced epsilon-based backward tolerance. The reviewed fix feature commit does not contain the required production/test remediation diff; it only updates validation artifacts, so this feature commit itself does not resolve the prior blocking defects.

issues.description: The feature handoff commitId points to commit 38b3ada, whose diff only changes scrutiny JSON/synthesis files and does not modify BackfillCursorStore or BackfillScheduler tests; therefore the submitted fix commit does not directly address the blocking monotonicity/runtime-coverage findings from the original failed features.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker marked followedProcedure=true, but required procedure evidence for indexing-efficiency-worker is incomplete.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill requires reading mission.md, AGENTS.md, .factory/library/architecture.md, and .factory/library/user-testing.md plus running `swift test --package-path OpenBurnBarCore`; handoff verification lists only BackfillScheduler xcodebuild and scripts/test-openburnbar-app.sh commands.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission shared guidance is switcher-centric while this review target is backfill/reconciliation, which repeatedly causes worker context drift.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md and .factory/library/architecture.md describe switcher surfaces/invariants; transcript skeleton shows confusion and re-orientation before backfill-specific inspection.

summary: Fail. Comparing original failed diffs (33f9ac2/991904f/ae68a63) against the submitted fix feature commit (38b3ada) shows the reviewed commit is validation-only and does not carry the required code/test remediation diff, so this feature submission does not, by itself, close the prior blocking backfill failures.
